verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: Closest match Fast Replica Exchange SGLD (arXiv 2301.01898) at 0.63 joint coverage — covers M_1 (variance-temperature link) + M_4 (annealed ladder) but does not perform per-coord corrective whitening. fSGLD isotropic only. Pattern E preserved.
